---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or surface change
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## What you'd like to do

The use case in one or two sentences. Lead with the user goal, not the
implementation.

## Why the current API doesn't cover it

What you tried, where it fell short.

## Proposed shape (optional)

If you have a concrete API in mind, sketch it. A Cypher snippet, a Rust
signature, or a Python call — whichever fits.

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you ruled out and why.

## Scope check

- [ ] This is a small surface change (a flag, a new method on an existing type)
- [ ] This is a non-trivial design change → an [RFC](https://github.com/namidb/namidb/blob/main/docs/rfc/_template.md) is the right format
